# stremio Provider

Terraform provider for Stremio account operations, including authentication, account management, and addon collection management.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `base_url` (String) Base URL for the Stremio API. Defaults to `https://api.strem.io`.
- `email` (String) Account email used for provider-level authentication.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Account password used for provider-level authentication.
